column1: # ARIS skill catalog — single source of truth for selective install.
# <requires> = comma-separated skills the entry invokes as hard pipeline phases
# (selecting the skill auto-includes them), or "-" for none. Soft "see also"
# mentions do NOT belong here. Every skills/<name>/SKILL.md must appear exactly
